chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appl. No.60 of 2022 (The State v. The Bank Manager Bank Al Habib Limited) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution 09.05.2024 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ========= By way of the instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 94 r/w Section 561-A Cr.PC a direction has been sought by the State against the Manager, Bank Al-Habib Limited, Islamic Banking Branch, Karachi, to produce certain documents necessary for the investigation of case outcome of FIR Crime No.113/2021 under Section 489-F PPC, PS City Court, Karachi. Head arguments and perused the record. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the the Manager, Bank Al-Habib Limited, Islamic Banking Branch, Karachi, has failed to produce the documents required for the investigation of the subject case, then he could have proceeded with in terms of Section 175 P.PC. If the Investigating Officer has no intention to take action against him for such omission under the said penal section, then alternatively subject to the law he could approach the Magistrate/Sessions Judge having jurisdiction for the purpose. No case for indulgence by this Court is made out. Consequently, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed in limine. J U D G E Nadir*
